title: How To Use Spotify In The Cars

messages.content: # Want to use spotify in your car but it is not working? Follow this guide!

# Step 1
> [Install Spotify from their website](https://download.scdn.co/SpotifySetup.exe)
# Step 2
> Sign into your account
# Step 3
> Close Content Manager after installing if it was open
# Step 4
> Now you should be able to play it from your car.
